summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. No shared canonical exists, no security-sensitive signals were hydrated, low-signal and instant close are disabled, and merge/fix/raise_pr actions are blocked by the job. Open PRs are kept open for normal maintainer review or as related follow-up work; closed context refs are evidence only.

actions.reason: Keep open as an independent contribution requiring ordinary maintainer technical/product review; no close, merge, fix, or PR replacement action is permitted or justified.
Keep as related maintainer-owned draft work; draft and maintainer signal rule out closeout or low-signal cleanup.

Keep open as related maintainer-owned follow-up work. The waiting-on-author status and bot finding require normal author/maintainer handling, not inventory cleanup.
